slots.caption_ig:
Walk-in availability is a quality signal we underweight. The spots without Resy aren't worse — they're often better and the owner has zero interest in tourist optimization. We added a walk-in filter. Use it.

#ForkFox #WalkIn #FoodSmart #PhillyEats #DishNotRestaurant
slots.caption_fb: Walk-in availability is a signal we don't talk about enough. The spots that don't take reservations aren't worse — they're often better, run by owners with zero interest in optimizing for tourists or platform algorithms. We added a walk-in filter so you can find them.
slots.image_gen_prompt: A 'walk-in only' sign on a vintage diner door at night. Warm interior glow through window. Editorial. 1080x1080.
slots.video_gen_prompt: Vertical 9:16, 7s. Door of a small diner, 'WALK-IN ONLY' sign. Hand pushes door open. Warm interior. Text: 'The walk-in factor.'
